g.text: • Position i can ONLY attend to positions 0..i (inclusive)
• Upper triangle represents FUTURE tokens relative to current Query
• torch.triu(..., diagonal=1) ensures self-attention is preserved
Q₄ attends: {K₀, K₁, K₂, K₃, K₄}
General Rule: Q_i attends to K_j ∀ j ≤ i
